Bash(/c/Python311/python.exe -c "
import sys, time
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(line_buffering=True\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'python_functions/rag'\)

print\('1. Importing...', flush=True\)
from chunker import chunk_transcript
from embedder import get_openai_client, embed_texts
from vector_store import get_client, upsert_chunks

print\('2. Parsing file...', flush=True\)
chunks = chunk_transcript\(r'C:\\Users\\User\\Dropbox\\Know\\Protokollen ABU\\Protokollen\\claims\\14022024 VV Reim.txt'\)
print\(f'   {len\(chunks\)} chunks', flush=True\)

print\('3. Getting OpenAI client...', flush=True\)
oc = get_openai_client\(\)

print\('4. Embedding...', flush=True\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
texts = [c.text for c in chunks]
vectors = embed_texts\(texts, oc\)
print\(f'   Done in {time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s', flush=True\)

print\('5. Upserting to Qdrant...', flush=True\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
payloads = [c.to_dict\(\) for c in chunks]
upsert_chunks\(payloads, vectors, get_client\(\)\)
print\(f'   Done in {time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s', flush=True\)

print\('SUCCESS', flush=True\)
" 2>&1)
